prompt: Watercolour painting — an ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5). A lone postman in a khaki uniform and turban, a heavy mailbag on his slumped shoulder, walking a line of footprints across vast empty sand dunes under a blazing white sun, a few khejri trees in the distance. Heroic, solitary, glowing against a dark ground. Loose luminous watercolour washes, soft wet-on-wet colour bleeds, granulation and visible paper grain, glowing against the dark ground. No text, no labels.
